title: Silent Ghasts
body:
The Silent Ghasts resource pack mutes the following ghast scream sound files:
 - scream1.ogg
 - scream2.ogg
 - scream3.ogg
 - scream4.ogg
 - scream5.ogg

These files have been replaced with a silent .ogg audio file, this means whenever a ghast takes damage in the game, you won't hear the typical ghast's scream of pain, making your Nether explorations or time spent near ghast farms much more peaceful.
The rest of the sounds, including the ambient atmosphere of the Nether and the noises made by other mobs, remain completely intact, preserving the overall sound experience while removing just the ghast's scream.
